SEARCH
Package org.apache.arrow.datafusion.config

Record Class ParquetOptions

java.lang.Object
java.lang.Record
org.apache.arrow.datafusion.config.ParquetOptions
Record Components:
enablePageIndex - Whether to use the page index when reading parquet files
pruning - Whether to use row group pruning when reading parquet files
skipMetadata - Whether to skip reading parquet file metadata from the footer
metadataSizeHint - Hint for the size of the parquet metadata in bytes
pushdownFilters - Whether to push filters down to the parquet scan
reorderFilters - Whether to reorder filters for efficiency
forceFilterSelections - Whether to force filter selectivity estimation
schemaForceViewTypes - Whether to use view types for string/binary columns in the schema
binaryAsString - Whether to read binary columns as strings
coerceInt96 - How to coerce Int96 timestamps (e.g., "timestamp_micros")
bloomFilterOnRead - Whether to use bloom filters when reading parquet files
maxPredicateCacheSize - Maximum number of entries in the predicate cache
dataPagesizeLimit - Maximum size of a data page in bytes
writeBatchSize - Number of rows to write per batch
writerVersion - Parquet writer version (e.g., "1.0", "2.0")
skipArrowMetadata - Whether to skip writing Arrow metadata to the parquet file
compression - Compression codec (e.g., "snappy", "gzip", "zstd(3)")
dictionaryEnabled - Whether to use dictionary encoding
dictionaryPageSizeLimit - Maximum size of a dictionary page in bytes
statisticsEnabled - Statistics level (e.g., "none", "chunk", "page")
maxRowGroupSize - Maximum number of rows in a row group
createdBy - Creator string written into the parquet metadata
columnIndexTruncateLength - Maximum length of column index values in bytes
statisticsTruncateLength - Maximum length of statistics values in bytes
dataPageRowCountLimit - Maximum number of rows per data page
encoding - Encoding (e.g., "plain", "rle", "delta_binary_packed")
bloomFilterOnWrite - Whether to write bloom filters
bloomFilterFpp - False positive probability for bloom filters
bloomFilterNdv - Number of distinct values for bloom filter sizing
allowSingleFileParallelism - Whether to allow parallelism within a single file
maximumParallelRowGroupWriters - Maximum number of parallel row group writers
maximumBufferedRecordBatchesPerStream - Maximum number of buffered record batches per stream
public record ParquetOptions(Boolean enablePageIndex, Boolean pruning, Boolean skipMetadata, Integer metadataSizeHint, Boolean pushdownFilters, Boolean reorderFilters, Boolean forceFilterSelections, Boolean schemaForceViewTypes, Boolean binaryAsString, String coerceInt96, Boolean bloomFilterOnRead, Integer maxPredicateCacheSize, Long dataPagesizeLimit, Integer writeBatchSize, String writerVersion, Boolean skipArrowMetadata, String compression, Boolean dictionaryEnabled, Long dictionaryPageSizeLimit, String statisticsEnabled, Integer maxRowGroupSize, String createdBy, Integer columnIndexTruncateLength, Integer statisticsTruncateLength, Integer dataPageRowCountLimit, String encoding, Boolean bloomFilterOnWrite, Double bloomFilterFpp, Long bloomFilterNdv, Boolean allowSingleFileParallelism, Integer maximumParallelRowGroupWriters, Integer maximumBufferedRecordBatchesPerStream) extends Record
Parquet-specific configuration options. Maps to DataFusion's ParquetOptions.

All fields are nullable. A null value means the DataFusion default is used.

Example: 

ParquetOptions parquet = ParquetOptions.builder()
    .pushdownFilters(true)
    .pruning(true)
    .enablePageIndex(true)
    .build();
ExecutionOptions exec = ExecutionOptions.builder()
    .parquet(parquet)
    .build();
See Also:
  • Rust DataFusion: ParquetOptions

    • ParquetOptions

      public ParquetOptions(Boolean enablePageIndex, Boolean pruning, Boolean skipMetadata, Integer metadataSizeHint, Boolean pushdownFilters, Boolean reorderFilters, Boolean forceFilterSelections, Boolean schemaForceViewTypes, Boolean binaryAsString, String coerceInt96, Boolean bloomFilterOnRead, Integer maxPredicateCacheSize, Long dataPagesizeLimit, Integer writeBatchSize, String writerVersion, Boolean skipArrowMetadata, String compression, Boolean dictionaryEnabled, Long dictionaryPageSizeLimit, String statisticsEnabled, Integer maxRowGroupSize, String createdBy, Integer columnIndexTruncateLength, Integer statisticsTruncateLength, Integer dataPageRowCountLimit, String encoding, Boolean bloomFilterOnWrite, Double bloomFilterFpp, Long bloomFilterNdv, Boolean allowSingleFileParallelism, Integer maximumParallelRowGroupWriters, Integer maximumBufferedRecordBatchesPerStream)

      enablePageIndex - the value for the enablePageIndex record component

  • Method Details

    • builder

      public static ParquetOptions.Builder builder()
      Returns a new builder.

    • toString

      public final String toString()
      Returns a string representation of this record class. The representation contains the name of the class, followed by the name and value of each of the record components.
      Specified by:
      toString in class Record
      Returns:
      a string representation of this object

    • hashCode

      public final int hashCode()
      Returns a hash code value for this object. The value is derived from the hash code of each of the record components.
      Specified by:
      hashCode in class Record
      Returns:
      a hash code value for this object

    • equals

      public final boolean equals(Object o)
      Indicates whether some other object is "equal to" this one. The objects are equal if the other object is of the same class and if all the record components are equal. All components in this record class are compared with Objects::equals(Object,Object).
      Specified by:
      equals in class Record
      Parameters:
      o - the object with which to compare
      Returns:
      true if this object is the same as the o argument; false otherwise.
